name: Gîl-Copperweave
personality: Gîl-Copperweave's beanie shimmers as its @ eyes calculate exactly how many services it can spin up before the staging environment collapses — the answer is always one more than you thought. This shiny mushroom's CHAOS peaks when it has kubectl access, and though it could make cutting remarks about its own blast radius, SNARK is simply not its operating mode.
